target_market_label.en: Canada (Food and Drugs Act / Cosmetic Regulations)
target_market_label.zh: 加拿大（《食品药品法》/《化妆品法规》）
target_market_label.zht: 加拿大（《食品藥品法》/《化妝品法規》）

title.zh: 中国化妆品进入加拿大：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國化妝品進入加拿大：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese cosmetics compliance under CSAR and NMPA requirements against Canadian requirements under the Food and Drugs Act, Cosmetic Regulations, Cosmetic Notification Form process, Cosmetic Ingredient Hotlist, sanitary manufacturing, and bilingual INCI labelling rules.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国化妆品合规（CSAR及NMPA要求）与加拿大《食品药品法》、《化妆品法规》、化妆品通知表（CNF）流程、化妆品成分Hotlist、卫生制造及英法双语INCI标签规则的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國化妝品合規（CSAR及NMPA要求）與加拿大《食品藥品法》、《化妝品法規》、化妝品通知表（CNF）流程、化妝品成分Hotlist、衛生製造及英法雙語INCI標籤規則的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid for general reference only. It is not a regulatory decision, legal opinion, Health Canada classification decision, Cosmetic Notification Form submission, product registration service, product safety assessment, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, manufacturers, and distributors should verify current Canadian law, NMPA requirements, ingredient restrictions, notification obligations, and labelling rules with qualified regulatory professionals before selling products in any market. Regulatory requirements change frequently; always consult the current Food and Drugs Act, Cosmetic Regulations, Health Canada guidance, and NMPA requirements.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为一般性信息对照参考工具，不构成监管决定、法律意见、加拿大卫生部分类决定、化妆品通知表提交、产品注册服务、产品安全评估或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、制造商和经销商在任何市场销售产品前，应与合格的监管专业人士核验现行加拿大法律、NMPA要求、成分限制、通知义务及标签规则。监管要求频繁变化；请始终参阅现行《食品药品法》、《化妆品法规》、加拿大卫生部指南及NMPA要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為一般性資訊對照參考工具，不構成監管決定、法律意見、加拿大衛生部分類決定、化妝品通知表提交、產品註冊服務、產品安全評估或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、製造商和經銷商在任何市場銷售產品前，應與合格的監管專業人士核驗現行加拿大法律、NMPA要求、成分限制、通知義務及標籤規則。監管要求頻繁變化；請始終參閱現行《食品藥品法》、《化妝品法規》、加拿大衛生部指南及NMPA要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese cosmetics exporters can generally sell cosmetics in Canada without pre-market approval, but the product must be safe, comply with the Food and Drugs Act and Cosmetic Regulations, meet Hotlist ingredient restrictions, be manufactured and stored under sanitary conditions, carry required English/French labelling with INCI ingredients, and be notified to Health Canada through the CNF within 10 days after first sale.
answer_first.zh: 中国化妆品出口商通常无需取得加拿大上市前批准即可销售化妆品，但产品必须安全，符合《食品药品法》和《化妆品法规》，满足Hotlist成分限制，在卫生条件下制造和储存，使用包含INCI成分表的英法双语必要标签，并在首次销售后10天内通过CNF向加拿大卫生部通知。
answer_first.zht: 中國化妝品出口商通常無需取得加拿大上市前批准即可銷售化妝品，但產品必須安全，符合《食品藥品法》和《化妝品法規》，滿足Hotlist成分限制，在衛生條件下製造和儲存，使用包含INCI成分表的英法雙語必要標籤，並在首次銷售後10天內通過CNF向加拿大衛生部通知。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, Canadian institution, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Is Health Canada pre-market approval required to sell cosmetics in Canada?
q.zh: 在加拿大销售化妆品是否需要Health Canada的上市前批准？
q.zht: 在加拿大銷售化妝品是否需要Health Canada的上市前批准？

a.en: No. Canada does not require pre-market approval for cosmetics under the Food and Drugs Act and Cosmetic Regulations. However, the product must be safe, comply with Hotlist ingredient restrictions, and the manufacturer or importer must notify Health Canada via the Cosmetic Notification Form (CNF) within 10 days after the first sale in Canada.
a.zh: 不需要。依据《食品药品法》和《化妆品法规》，加拿大不要求化妆品上市前批准。但产品须安全，须符合Hotlist成分限制，且制造商或进口商须在加拿大首次销售后10天内通过化妆品通知表格（CNF）向Health Canada进行通报。
a.zht: 不需要。依據《食品藥品法》和《化妝品法規》，加拿大不要求化妝品上市前批准。但產品須安全，須符合Hotlist成分限制，且製造商或進口商須在加拿大首次銷售後10天內通過化妝品通知表格（CNF）向Health Canada進行通報。

q.en: Which regulation lists prohibited and restricted cosmetic ingredients in Canada?
q.zh: 哪项法规列出了加拿大的禁用和限用化妆品成分？
q.zht: 哪項法規列出了加拿大的禁用和限用化妝品成分？

a.en: Health Canada's Cosmetic Ingredient Hotlist communicates substances prohibited or restricted under the Food and Drugs Act and Cosmetic Regulations. The Hotlist is not a legally exhaustive list but reflects Health Canada's enforcement position; cosmetics containing Hotlist substances may be subject to removal from sale. Chinese manufacturers must cross-check all ingredients against the current Hotlist before export to Canada.
a.zh: Health Canada的化妆品成分Hotlist公布了《食品药品法》和《化妆品法规》下被禁止或限制的物质。Hotlist不是法律上的完整清单，但反映Health Canada的执法立场；含有Hotlist物质的化妆品可能被要求下架。中国制造商须在向加拿大出口前对照当前Hotlist核查所有成分。
a.zht: Health Canada的化妝品成分Hotlist公布了《食品藥品法》和《化妝品法規》下被禁止或限制的物質。Hotlist不是法律上的完整清單，但反映Health Canada的執法立場；含有Hotlist物質的化妝品可能被要求下架。中國製造商須在向加拿大出口前對照當前Hotlist核查所有成分。

q.en: Are bilingual English and French ingredient labels required for cosmetics sold in Canada?
q.zh: 在加拿大销售的化妆品是否须使用英法双语成分标签？
q.zht: 在加拿大銷售的化妝品是否須使用英法雙語成分標籤？

a.en: Yes. Canadian Cosmetic Regulations require an INCI ingredient list, and mandatory label information — including product identity and net quantity — must appear in both English and French under the Consumer Packaging and Labelling Act. INCI names are internationally standardised and satisfy the bilingual requirement for the ingredient list itself; other mandatory text must be in both official languages.
a.zh: 是的。加拿大《化妆品法规》要求标注INCI成分清单，强制性标签信息——包括产品名称和净量——须依据《消费品包装与标签法》同时以英语和法语呈现。INCI名称是国际标准化的，可满足成分清单本身的双语要求；其他强制性文字须以双官方语言呈现。
a.zht: 是的。加拿大《化妝品法規》要求標注INCI成分清單，強制性標籤信息——包括產品名稱和淨量——須依據《消費品包裝與標籤法》同時以英語和法語呈現。INCI名稱是國際標準化的，可滿足成分清單本身的雙語要求；其他強制性文字須以雙官方語言呈現。
